page: Microsoft Azure M176ds_4_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MDSMediumMemoryv3 family. It is powered by an Intel x86_64 processor architecture, delivering 176 dedicated virtual CPUs (vCPUs) managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The server features a massive memory allocation of 3892.0 GB of RAM, translating to approximately 22.11 GB of memory per core.

For storage, the instance includes a 410 GB local disk and is Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance external storage volumes. It does not include integrated GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The hardware configuration is designed for workloads requiring extreme memory density relative to compute resources, without the need for hardware acceleration.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this server represents a high-resource tier optimized for massive memory footprints. The high memory-to-vCPU ratio makes it highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems, and heavy data analytics workloads. The lack of integrated GPUs and the specific local storage capacity suggest that primary data persistence should rely on external Premium Storage, while the local disk serves temporary files or paging needs.
description: Microsoft Azure M176ds_4_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MDSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an Intel x86_64 architecture with 176 dedicated vCPUs and an extensive memory capacity of 3892.0 GB, yielding 22.11 GB of RAM per core. The instance is equipped with a 410 GB local disk and supports Premium Storage for high-performance external disk configurations. It does not include graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Given its massive memory-to-vCPU ratio, this server is designed for resource-intensive enterprise workloads, such as large-scale in-memory databases, SAP HANA, massive data warehousing, and complex enterprise resource planning systems that require substantial memory capacity without GPU acceleration. The hardware profile provides high resource density for memory-bound applications, balancing massive RAM with dedicated compute cores.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M176ds_4_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 176 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 3892 GB of RAM, and a 410 GB local disk designed for enterprise in-memory database workloads.

tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated x86_64 processing cores and extensive RAM for enterprise database workloads.
